name: Post-Abatement Temporary Chemical Storage Reporting
description: Create a new facility record named 'Site 44 Abatement Staging' (or open it if it already exists) in EPA Tier2 Submit. Add an Attachment to the facility of type 'Site Plan' using the file at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\site44_temp_tank_plan.pdf. Then, add a chemical: Sodium Hydroxide (CAS 1310-73-2), Physical State: Liquid. Check hazards: Corrosive to metal, Skin corrosion or irritation, Serious eye damage or eye irritation. Set Maximum Daily Amount to Range Code 05 and Average Daily Amount to Range Code 04. CRITICALLY, set the Number of Days On-Site to 90 (override the default 365). Add a storage location: 'Temp Tank T-1 (Demobilized)', Type: 'Tank (above ground)', Pressure: 'Ambient pressure', Temperature: 'Ambient temperature'. Finally, use File > Create Submission to export ONLY this facility as a submission file to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Site44_Submission.t2s.
